opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like I'm passing shards of glass every time I go to the toilet, and I can't leave the bathroom.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning came on out of nowhere and got really bad fast — I'm running to the toilet every 15 minutes and I'm in a lot of pain and quite distressed.

symptom_narrative.duration: 6 hours and it has got worse quickly
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp, burning, stinging pain when I pass urine — like glass
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — I'm in a lot of pain and very distressed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down in the middle of my tummy, above the pubic bone, and it stings as the urine comes out
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: started mild then rapidly got much worse; now constant
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — I tried an over-the-counter urinary sachet and it barely helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: passing urine makes the burning worse, and I feel like I need to go again straight away
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel like I constantly need to wee even when my bladder is empty, there's a heavy dragging feeling above my pubic bone, and my urine looks cloudy and smells strong. No fever or chills that I've noticed, and no back pain.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't leave the bathroom or the house — I'm stuck at home because I have to go so often

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an over-the-counter urinary alkaliniser sachet I took once today

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; feeling very distressed and homebound by how often she has to go to the toilet

objective_data_offered.value: urine in the toilet looks cloudy and smells strong
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own visual/smell impression, not a laboratory finding

objective_data_offered.value: I don't feel hot or feverish and I haven't had any shivering or chills
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective — patient has not measured her temperature with a thermometer
